atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports pain in the right middle finger.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports pain for approximately five days.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient describes the pain as 'very much so'.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient indicates the pain is exacerbated by palpation.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports tenderness at the base of the middle finger.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient states he was rear-ended while stopped at a four-way stop sign.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient states the other driver was texting.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has a distal phalanx fracture of the middle finger, likely secondary to blunt trauma.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician is prescribing tramadol 50 mg every six hours as needed for pain for two days.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician is ordering a finger splint to be worn.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient will have a follow-up x-ray in two weeks.
